core_insight: Both ICT and Forex share the same fundamental failure: ENTERING BEFORE THE MARKET COMMITS. ICT: 61% of losses stop within 3 bars — the move hasn't started. Forex: UNEXPLAINED losses are macro-aligned but momentum-flat — same cause. The edge exists. The timing is premature.

shared_failure.name: PREMATURE_ENTRY
shared_failure.ict_evidence: 61% of losses exit within 3 bars (fast stops)
shared_failure.forex_evidence: 59 UNEXPLAINED losses: macro-aligned (0.949) but flat momentum (0.005)
shared_failure.shared_fix: Both systems need a momentum confirmation requirement at entry

shared_wins.ict: London session A-grade entries → 14/17 TP2 hits. 7.2 bar avg hold.
shared_wins.pattern: When direction + macro + momentum all agree AND the market has already started moving: that is the exact setup profile for outsized wins in BOTH systems.

next_experiments.hypothesis: London-only mode improves Sharpe by removing -0.283R NY_PM drag
next_experiments.test: Run ict_backtest with NY_PM disabled. Compare walk-forward stats.

next_experiments.hypothesis: Score cap at 9.0 (block A+ grade) improves WR
next_experiments.test: Re-grade: treat all scores > 9.0 as 8.99 (grade A). Backtest.
next_experiments.expected_impact: Removes 26 trades at -0.375R avg, keeping 72 trades at +0.383R

next_experiments.test: Add momentum floor to signal_engine._macro_signal_for_date(). Backtest.

next_experiments.hypothesis: pd_alignment component is anti-edge (20% WR vs 35% WR without it)
next_experiments.test: Zero out pd_alignment weight in ICT scorer. Backtest.
next_experiments.expected_impact: WR +15pp on subset with pd_alignment>0 (25 trades)

shared_goal_tracker.ICT_target: FunderPro challenge pass — need 30 paper trades, 70.5% MC pass rate confirmed
shared_goal_tracker.joint_principle: v004/v006 is the foundation. Add edges only when they survive out-of-sample. Never trade against macro+momentum alignment.
